pages.title: Hl 1 (Proceed at line speed)
pages.meaning: Proceed at the permitted line speed. Expect line speed at the next main signal.
whatToDo: Proceed at the permitted speed.

pages.title: Hl 2 (Proceed at 100)
pages.recognise: Steady green upper light, steady yellow lower light and a green speed strip.
pages.meaning: Proceed at no more than 100 km/h. Expect line speed at the next main signal.
whatToDo: Reach 100 km/h by the signal if required.
Maintain no more than 100 km/h through the applicable area.

pages.title: Hl 3a (Proceed at 40)
pages.recognise: Steady green upper light and steady yellow lower light, with no speed strip.
pages.meaning: Proceed at no more than 40 km/h. Expect line speed at the next main signal.
whatToDo: Reach 40 km/h by the signal.

pages.title: Hl 3b (Proceed at 60)
pages.recognise: Steady green upper light, steady yellow lower light and a yellow speed strip.
pages.meaning: Proceed at no more than 60 km/h. Expect line speed at the next main signal.
whatToDo: Reach 60 km/h by the signal.

pages.title: Hl 4 (Expect 100)
pages.meaning: Proceed at the permitted line speed. Expect 100 km/h at the next main signal.
whatToDo: Proceed at the current permitted speed.
Prepare to reach 100 km/h at the next signal.

pages.title: Hl 5 (100 now, 100 next)
pages.recognise: Flashing green upper light, steady yellow lower light and a green speed strip.
pages.meaning: Proceed at no more than 100 km/h and expect 100 km/h at the next main signal.
whatToDo: Observe 100 km/h.

pages.title: Hl 6a (40 now, expect 100)
pages.recognise: Flashing green upper light and steady yellow lower light, with no speed strip.
pages.meaning: Proceed at no more than 40 km/h and expect 100 km/h at the next main signal.
whatToDo: Reach 40 km/h by the signal.

pages.title: Hl 6b (60 now, expect 100)
pages.recognise: Flashing green upper light, steady yellow lower light and a yellow speed strip.
pages.meaning: Proceed at no more than 60 km/h and expect 100 km/h at the next main signal.
whatToDo: Reach 60 km/h by the signal.

pages.title: Hl 7 (Expect 40 or 60)
pages.meaning: Proceed at the permitted line speed. Expect 40 or 60 km/h at the next main signal.
whatToDo: Begin braking for a restrictive speed at the next signal.
Read the exact 40 or 60 km/h value at that signal.

pages.title: Hl 8 (100 now, expect 40 or 60)
pages.recognise: Flashing yellow upper light, steady yellow lower light and a green speed strip.
pages.meaning: Proceed at no more than 100 km/h. Expect 40 or 60 km/h at the next main signal.
whatToDo: Observe 100 km/h.
Brake for the next restrictive speed.

pages.title: Hl 9a (40 now, expect 40 or 60)
pages.recognise: Flashing yellow upper light and steady yellow lower light, with no speed strip.
pages.meaning: Proceed at no more than 40 km/h. Expect 40 or 60 km/h at the next main signal.
whatToDo: Maintain no more than 40 km/h.

pages.title: Hl 9b (60 now, expect 40 or 60)
pages.recognise: Flashing yellow upper light, steady yellow lower light and a yellow speed strip.
pages.meaning: Proceed at no more than 60 km/h. Expect 40 or 60 km/h at the next main signal.
whatToDo: Maintain no more than 60 km/h.
Prepare for the speed shown at the next signal.

pages.title: Hl 10 (Expect stop)
pages.meaning: Proceed at the permitted line speed and expect the next main signal to show stop.
whatToDo: Acknowledge PZB when the 1000 Hz influence is active.
Brake to stop before the next main signal.

pages.title: Hl 11 (100 now, expect stop)
pages.recognise: Steady yellow upper light, steady yellow lower light and a green speed strip.
pages.meaning: Proceed at no more than 100 km/h and expect the next main signal to show stop.
whatToDo: Observe 100 km/h.
Acknowledge PZB when required and brake to stop at the next signal.

pages.title: Hl 12a (40 now, expect stop)
pages.recognise: Two steady yellow lights with no speed strip.
pages.meaning: Proceed at no more than 40 km/h and expect the next main signal to show stop.
whatToDo: Reach 40 km/h by the signal.
Acknowledge PZB when required and prepare to stop.

pages.title: Hl 12b (60 now, expect stop)
pages.recognise: Two steady yellow lights and a yellow speed strip.
pages.meaning: Proceed at no more than 60 km/h and expect the next main signal to show stop.
whatToDo: Reach 60 km/h by the signal.
Acknowledge PZB when required and prepare to stop.

pages.title: Hp 0 (Stop)
whatToDo: Stop before the signal.
Do not pass without authority or a valid subsidiary indication.
